# TrackSpeed

> TrackSpeed is an iOS app that turns your phone into a professional sprint timing system. ~4ms accuracy, 120fps detection, multi-device sync. No hardware needed. Free to download.

## Key Facts

- Founded by two-time Olympian Sondre Guttormsen, national record holder Andreas Trajkovski, and Olympic pole vaulter Simen Guttormsen
- Uses camera-based motion detection with sub-frame interpolation for ~4ms effective timing accuracy
- Supports multi-device peer-to-peer sync for start/finish line timing
- Pricing: Free tier, $8.99/month, $49.99/year, $139 lifetime
- iOS only (iPhone)
- 13 languages supported

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://mytrackspeed.com): Product overview, features, pricing comparison, athlete testimonials
- [Technology](https://mytrackspeed.com/technology): How sub-frame interpolation, rolling shutter correction, and clock sync achieve ~4ms accuracy
- [About](https://mytrackspeed.com/about): Team bios — Olympic athletes and engineers behind TrackSpeed
- [Support](https://mytrackspeed.com/support): FAQ, troubleshooting, contact information
- [Blog](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog): Guides and comparisons for sprint timing

## Blog Articles

- [Sprint Timing Systems Buyer's Guide](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog/sprint-timing-gates-buyers-guide): Complete comparison of laser gates, camera apps, and stopwatches with 3-year cost analysis
- [How to Time a 40-Yard Dash](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog/how-to-time-a-40-yard-dash): Step-by-step guide to accurate 40-yard dash timing with a phone
- [Sprint Timing Systems Compared](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog/sprint-timing-systems-compared): Laser gates vs camera vs stopwatch — accuracy, cost, consistency
- [Multi-Phone Sprint Timing Setup](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog/multi-phone-sprint-timing-setup): How to set up two phones for split timing at start and finish lines
- [Sprint Training Drills](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog/improve-sprint-speed-training): 4 drills that benefit from accurate timing data
- [What Is Photo Finish Timing](https://mytrackspeed.com/blog/what-is-photo-finish-timing): History and technology of photo finish from 1880s to smartphone era

## Pricing Comparison

| System | Price | Accuracy |
|--------|-------|----------|
| TrackSpeed | Free - $49.99/yr | ~4ms |
| Freelap | $500 - $2,000+ | ~2ms |
| Brower | $1,500 - $5,000+ | ~1ms |
| DASHR | $500 - $1,500+ | ~1ms |
| Manual stopwatch | $10 - $50 | ~200ms |
